meta.title: ICS Security - April Month In Review
meta.description:
Daniel Kapellman Zafra joins Dale Peterson to discuss three stories, give wins, fails and predictions, and take your questions. You can record a question at dale-peterson.com or enter it in via chat during the live broadcast.

The April topics:
1. INCONTROLLER ... how is this new in terms of offense ... what does it mean that it was found before doing damage ... what is it's future ... other issues

2. INDUSTROYER2 ... this may be shorter, but I think a talk on the targeted nature might be worthwhile

3. JCDC ICS ... what should we expect from this? Should any company be welcome to join?
